name: Bubble Fruit Shooter 2D
description: Bubble Fruit Shooter 2D Game is an entertaining 2D bubble shooter puzzle game where players must shoot and match colorful fruit bubbles to remove them from the screen. Match three or more identical fruits to create powerful combos and clear challenging levels. With simple controls, smooth gameplay, and vibrant visuals, this game is perfect for players of all ages. As you progress, levels become more challenging with new obstacles, tricky bubble patterns, and exciting puzzle mechanics.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
